creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
Most of the ports are fixed. The remaining ports have PLIST change, therefore I put them in the new patch (devel-py-setuptools-v2.txt) along with py-setuptools 60.10.0.

Remaining ports:
- devel/ikos
- multimedia/gpodder
- multimedia/mythtv
- net/py-libdnet
- print/system-config-printer
- science/py-PyNE
- security/py-gpgme
- security/sssd
- security/suricata
- www/chrome-gnome-shell
